title: [trustless://eil] Soispoke - FOCIL: Restoring Censorship Resistance on Ethereum
description:
Soispoke of the Ethereum Foundation provides a brief history of censorship resistance on Ethereum, followed by an overview of FOCIL (EIP-7805) and its role in restoring credible neutrality and trustlessness. This talk explains how multi-proposer inclusion lists provide robust protocol-level inclusion guarantees and why this EIP is essential to reestablish Ethereum as the most reliable venue to transact onchain.

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
